events.title: Foundation of Christian Political Discourse
events.description: Paul writes Romans 13 and Philippians 2, establishing the relationship between Church and State and the doctrine of kenosis.

events.title: The Golden Era of Rhetoric
events.description: John Chrysostom, through his Homilies on the Statues and commentaries on Paul, transforms theory into practical rhetoric within the imperial court.

events.title: Crisis and Synthesis of Tradition
events.description: The Church is called to discern the 'insidious persecution' of political expediency, keeping kenosis as its compass.
